name: Goodway Machine Corp.
summary: Goodway Machine Corp. develops, manufactures, and sells turning machines. It provides multi-axis turning, vertical turning, horizontal turning, swiss turning, and wheel turning products; grinders; and automation turning products, including bar feeders, gantry loading systems, loading and unloading systems, parts catchers and probes, tool presenters, and steady rests. The company offers its products through a network of dealers in Asia, the Americas, Africa, Europe, and Oceania. Goodway Machine Corp. was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.
